description: A property owner has signed a management agreement. The agent must set up the new property in the system.

nodes.task_description: Gather all property and owner information, including property details, owner contact info, and bank account details for distributions.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all necessary onboarding data.

nodes.task_description: Create a new property profile and owner profile in the property management software.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately sets up the new property and owner in the system.

nodes.task_description: If the property is tenanted, enter all existing lease information into the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly abstracts and enters data for existing tenants.
